Contractor|RecoverStashDesc:
Can't believe my luck. Not sure how, but it seems the location of one of my stashes was compromised and is about to be hit. 

If we hurry though, it might not be too late.

I want you to -
* go to We're running low on supply and need an extra pilot to help move things along.

You'll grab the raw ingredients from the farm, drop it off at the lab, take the refined stuff over to the stash to be cut and packaged, before taking the final product out to our runners. 

Here it is laid out plain so you don't get confused -

DELIVERY ITINERARY

PACKAGES FOR PICK UP (ANY ORDER)
     · Package #[item1|serialnumber] from [Pickup1|Address]
     · Package #[item2|serialnumber] from [Pickup2|Address]
     · Package #[item3|serialnumber] from [Pickup3|Address]

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Deliver ALL packages to [Dropoff1|Address]

And to make sure security doesn't start sniffing around, we arranged a dead-drop for the final hand off. 

Just keep it simple and follow the plan and it should be smooth sailing. Take care of everything on the list and you'll get a nice cut of the credits. 
* find all of my stash
* bring it back to [Destination|Address].

If you have the misfortune of running into any of these fetchlicks trying to rob me, I'll make sure you get a bonus for the extra trouble.

Turns out my perfect hiding spot is not that perfect.

Just got word that a crew might be on the way to pinch my stash. If we hurry, you can get to it first.

I want you to -
* go to We're running low on supply and need an extra pilot to help move things along.

You'll grab the raw ingredients from the farm, drop it off at the lab, take the refined stuff over to the stash to be cut and packaged, before taking the final product out to our runners. 

Here it is laid out plain so you don't get confused -

DELIVERY ITINERARY

PACKAGES FOR PICK UP (ANY ORDER)
     · Package #[item1|serialnumber] from [Pickup1|Address]
     · Package #[item2|serialnumber] from [Pickup2|Address]
     · Package #[item3|serialnumber] from [Pickup3|Address]

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Deliver ALL packages to [Dropoff1|Address]

And to make sure security doesn't start sniffing around, we arranged a dead-drop for the final hand off. 

Just keep it simple and follow the plan and it should be smooth sailing. Take care of everything on the list and you'll get a nice cut of the credits.
* find all of my stash
* bring it back to [Destination|Address].

If these pilfering pecks wind up showing before you finish, I'll make sure there's a few extra credits waiting for you.

A cousin of a friend of mine got shafted by their crew and decided the best way to settle the grudge was to let me know about the stash they have hidden away. Always pays to treat your crew well doesn't it?

I want you to -
* go to We're running low on supply and need an extra pilot to help move things along.

You'll grab the raw ingredients from the farm, drop it off at the lab, take the refined stuff over to the stash to be cut and packaged, before taking the final product out to our runners. 

Here it is laid out plain so you don't get confused -

DELIVERY ITINERARY

     · Package #[item2|serialnumber] from [Pickup2|Address]
     · Package #[item3|serialnumber] from [Pickup3|Address]

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Deliver ALL packages to [Dropoff1|Address]

And to make sure security doesn't start sniffing around, we arranged a dead-drop for the final hand off. 

Just keep it simple and follow the plan and it should be smooth sailing. Take care of everything on the list and you'll get a nice cut of the credits.
* find their stash
* bring it back to [Destination|Address].

It wasn't clear if they were guarding the spot or not, so there's a chance you could run into some resistance. There's a few extra creds coming your way if you do.

Thank the stars that dumb outlaws will always talk too much when they're hopped up on rot. This one git I was drinking with blabbed about a score they had secreted away in a hidden spot.

Figured we could teach them a lesson about the importance of holding your liquor.

I want you to -
* go to We're running low on supply and need an extra pilot to help move things along.

You'll grab the raw ingredients from the farm, drop it off at the lab, take the refined stuff over to the stash to be cut and packaged, before taking the final product out to our runners.

And to make sure security doesn't start sniffing around, we arranged a dead-drop for the final hand off. 

Just keep it simple and follow the plan and it should be smooth sailing. Take care of everything on the list and you'll get a nice cut of the credits.
* find their stash
* bring it back to [Destination|Address].

There's a chance this bumbling idiot and their friends might be hold up there too, so be careful. If you do run into trouble, I'll give you a bit extra on top to make it up to you.

Not a lot of people know this but, a few days ago my stash got raided by some clueless fetchlicks who decided robbing me was a smart thing to do.

Well, it turns out it wasn't cause I was able to track the numcells down to where they're hiding. You're gonna go teach them a lesson for me and get my stuff back.

I want you to -
* go to We're running low on supply and need an extra pilot to help move things along.

* find all my stolen stash
* bring it back to [Destination|Address].

Not sure if they'll be hanging around when you get there or not, but if you end up coming across these asshats, I'll see you get some extra creds for the hassle.

Took long enough, and I had to call in almost every favor I had, but I finally managed to track down that pecks that raided my stash. 

You're gonna steal it back for me.

I want you to -
* go to We're running low on supply and need an extra pilot to help move things along.

And if the idiots who did this are there, I'll make sure you get a little extra reward for the extra risk.
